title: coleus gratus
intro: Coleus gratus, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is an annual herb native to the tropical regions of Asia and is a member of the mint family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are extracted from its leaves. Coleus gratus offers various health benefits, including relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing stress. The leaves of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
